title: Southcentral Alaska Avalanche Workshop – Nov 9, 2018
summary: Mark your calendars for Friday November 9th when the 6th annual 'SAAW' (Southcentral Alaska Avalanche Workshop) kicks off the 2019 winter season!! We have an amazing line-up scheduled for this one day workshop including, special guest speaker Scott Savage from the Sawtooth Avalanche Center! Event We...
